title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 Tech Talk discusses why AI still struggles to reliably edit Word documents compared to humans. The core issue is that .docx files operate as structured software rather than plain text, requiring AI to understand and preserve complex internal logic when making edits at scale.
